description: Simple feature addition with clear requirements
title: Add user authentication

messages.content: I'd like to understand what 'done' looks like for user authentication. What specific functionality do you need, and are there any constraints on how it should be implemented?
We need users to be able to sign up with email/password and log in. Use Argon2 for password hashing. It's done when we have signup, login, and logout endpoints working.

Got it. Just to clarify - should the login sessions persist across browser restarts, or is this session-only? And are there any specific error cases you want handled (like rate limiting on login attempts)?
Sessions should persist. No rate limiting for now - keep it simple.
